title: Only traits defined in the current crate can be implemented for types defined outside the crate
explanation: This error enforces the orphan rule: you can only implement a trait for a type if either the trait or the type is defined in your crate. This prevents conflicting implementations across different crates.
error_message: error[E0117]: only traits defined in the current crate can be implemented for types defined outside of the crate
tip: The newtype pattern (wrapping a type in a single-field tuple struct) is the standard workaround. You can implement Deref on the wrapper for ergonomic access.
